full_name: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act — Security Rule (45 CFR §164.312)
authority: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) / OCR

controls.description: Every user accessing systems containing ePHI must be assigned a unique name or number for identification and tracking.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user account accessing ePHI systems is a shared_account = TRUE, or if user_id is NULL or generic (e.g., 'admin', 'user', 'test').

controls.description: Procedures must exist for obtaining necessary ePHI during emergency situations.
controls.logic: FAIL if no emergency_access_procedure document exists, or if emergency_access_log is not maintained, or if emergency_access has no post-use review.

controls.description: Electronic sessions must automatically terminate after a defined period of inactivity.
controls.logic: FAIL if any ePHI system has session_timeout_minutes = NULL or session_timeout_minutes > 15, or if automatic_logoff_enabled = FALSE.

controls.description: A mechanism to encrypt and decrypt ePHI must be implemented where appropriate based on risk analysis.
controls.logic: FAIL if any ePHI record has encryption_at_rest = FALSE without documented risk_analysis_justification, or if encryption_method is deprecated (DES, RC4).

controls.requirement: Audit Logs Enabled on All ePHI Systems
controls.description: Hardware, software, and procedural mechanisms must record and examine activity in systems containing ePHI.
controls.logic: FAIL if any system storing or accessing ePHI has audit_logging_enabled = FALSE, or if audit_logs are not retained for the required period (minimum 6 years).

controls.description: Audit logs must be regularly reviewed for unauthorized access or anomalous activity involving ePHI.
controls.logic: FAIL if log_review_last_date for any ePHI system is older than 7 days, or if no log_review_record exists for the current month.

controls.requirement: ePHI Not Improperly Altered or Destroyed
controls.description: Policies and procedures must protect ePHI from improper alteration or destruction.
controls.logic: FAIL if any ePHI record has no data_integrity_hash or if hash_verification_date is older than 30 days, or if modification_audit_trail_enabled = FALSE.

controls.description: Procedures must verify that a person or entity seeking access to ePHI is who they claim to be.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user accessing ePHI uses single-factor authentication only (password alone) without documented justification, or if authentication_method = 'NONE'.

controls.description: Technical security measures must guard against unauthorized access to ePHI transmitted over electronic networks.
controls.logic: FAIL if any ePHI transmission uses unencrypted channels (HTTP, FTP, SMTP without TLS), or if tls_version < 1.2.

controls.description: A comprehensive risk analysis of all potential risks and vulnerabilities to ePHI must be conducted.
controls.logic: FAIL if no risk_analysis record exists, or if risk_analysis_date is older than 12 months, or if analysis_scope excludes any ePHI system.

controls.description: Security measures must be implemented to reduce identified risks to ePHI to reasonable and appropriate levels.
controls.logic: FAIL if any identified risk with rating IN ('HIGH','CRITICAL') has no risk_treatment record, or if treatment_status = 'OPEN' and target_date is past.

controls.requirement: Security Awareness Training Provided to All Workforce
controls.description: All workforce members must receive training on security awareness and HIPAA obligations.
controls.logic: FAIL if any active employee with ePHI access has hipaa_training_completed = FALSE or training_completion_date older than 12 months.

controls.description: Appropriate sanctions must be applied to workforce members who fail to comply with security policies.
controls.logic: FAIL if any security_violation record with confirmed_breach = TRUE has sanction_applied = FALSE or sanction_record_id = NULL.

controls.description: A disaster recovery plan must be in place, documented, and tested to restore ePHI access after an emergency.
controls.logic: FAIL if no disaster_recovery_plan exists, or if drp_last_tested_date is older than 12 months, or if drp_test_result = 'FAILED'.

controls.description: All Business Associates with access to ePHI must sign a Business Associate Agreement (BAA) before accessing data.
controls.logic: FAIL if any vendor or partner with ephi_access = TRUE has no executed BAA, or if BAA_expiry_date is past, or if BAA_last_reviewed is older than 12 months.
